stories.title: Follow live: Folarin Balogun sent off with red car...
stories.summary: The United States kicks off its 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage as take on Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32.

stories.title: Sources: Brown heading to Philly in blockbuster
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown has a new home, with the Celtics agreeing to send their longtime star to the 76ers for Paul George, two first-round picks (2028, '31) and two second-round selections, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Wednesday.

stories.title: Balogun red-carded in USMNT clash with Bosnia
stories.summary: Folarin Balogun's star-turn at this World Cup went sideways early in the second half on Wednesday night, as the American forward was sent off against Bosnia-Herzegovina.

stories.title: Belgium pull off stunning rally, eliminate Senegal...
stories.summary: Youri Tielemans scored from the penalty spot in stoppage time of extra time, and Belgium came back from two goals down to beat Senegal 3-2 Wednesday in the round of 32 at the World Cup.

stories.title: Rays' Caminero homers in sixth straight game
stories.summary: Rays third baseman Junior Caminero, 22, has become the youngest player since at least 1900 to homer in six straight games.
